War Dispatches

All News & Updates

The Shattered Realm never stops changing. Neither do we. Patch notes, events, expansions, and developer dispatches — all in one place.

Featured
Event  ·  Mar 18, 2026

Season of Embers — Limited-Time Event Guide

21 days. New dungeon. Seven Ashen Colossus encounters. The Ember Drake mount, Cinderplate armor, and Blazebound weapon skins — all exclusive, all limited.

Read the full article →
Mar 25, 2026Update
Crimson Siege: Chapter III
Two new dungeons, expanded Ashfeld territories, and the long-awaited Dreadknight awakening arc. The war enters its bloodiest chapter yet.
Full dispatch coming soon
Mar 05, 2026Dev Note
Designing the Ashwalker — Developer Commentary
Lead designer Kael Vorn discusses the design philosophy behind the Ashwalker class, from early prototypes to the final kit that shipped in Chapter II.
Full dispatch coming soon
Feb 28, 2026Update
The Voidrift Expansion — Full Notes
New island region opens for exploration. Voidcaller abilities rebalanced, new underwater dungeon added, and a new faction quest chain begins.
Full dispatch coming soon
Feb 14, 2026Event
Blood Moon PvP Tournament
Server-wide siege event with exclusive champion rewards. The Blood Moon resets faction standings — every player enters as an equal. None remain that way.
Full dispatch coming soon
Feb 03, 2026Patch
Patch 2.3.0 — Engine Update
Performance improvements across all server regions, UI scaling fixes for ultra-wide displays, new graphics options menu, and DirectX 12 stability.
Full dispatch coming soon
Jan 22, 2026Dev Note
Roadmap: The First Half of 2026
A look at what Ironveil Studios has planned for the next six months: two major expansions, a new class, and a complete guild war system overhaul.
Full dispatch coming soon

Latest Patch

v2.4.1
Mar 12, 2026
  • Shadowblade Execute tuned (−8%)
  • Oathsinger Aegis 6s → 8s
  • Ironclad Juggernaut penalty fixed
  • Forge Colossus exploit resolved
  • 43 bug fixes
